content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (20d ann. XU100 25.9%) with extremely narrow participation (breadth 1/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?
Heavy Industry in RECOVERY: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%) ABOVE TREND, ARCLK (1W: +4.65% | 1M: -8.52%) RECOVERY, TOASO (1W: +1.47% | 1M: -7.46%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance in BELOW TREND: HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%) BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -18.67%) BELOW TREND; Energy & Chemicals also weak with TRALT (1W: -14.33% | 1M: -15.34%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%) ABOVE TREND; SISE (1W: +5.38% | 1M: -4.49%) RECOVERY; ARCLK (1W: +4.65% | 1M: -8.52%) RECOVERY; ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%) ABOVE TREND; KONTR (1W: +2.55% | 1M: -9.85%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TCELL (1W: -4.22% | 1M: -14.45%) BELOW TREND; TTKOM (1W: -4.37% | 1M: -18.58%) BELOW TREND; VAKBN (1W: -4.50% | 1M: -22.40%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -5.48% | 1M: -15.56%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -5.69% | 1M: -4.94%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Up-momentum: PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%) ABOVE TREND, SISE (1W: +5.38% | 1M: -4.49%) RECOVERY, ARCLK (1W: +4.65% | 1M: -8.52%) RECOVERY. Down-momentum: TRALT (1W: -14.33% | 1M: -15.34%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -7.64% | 1M: -22.59%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Defensive stance — most names BELOW TREND: AKBNK (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -18.67%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -2.03% | 1M: -16.14%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -2.92% | 1M: -20.47%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -3.01% | 1M: -19.45%) BELOW TREND, VAKBN (1W: -4.50% | 1M: -22.40%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%) BELOW TREND, TSKB (1W: +1.73% | 1M: -12.69%) RECOVERY.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Selective recovery in Heavy Industry: ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +1.40% | 1M: -8.34%) RECOVERY, TOASO (1W: +1.47% | 1M: -7.46%) RECOVERY, while EREGL (1W: -2.65% | 1M: -5.87%) remains BELOW TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Mixed but watchable — PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%) ABOVE TREND and TUPRS (1W: -0.42% | 1M: +18.70%) CORRECTION contrast with HEKTS (1W: -5.48% | 1M: -15.56%) BELOW TREND and TRALT (1W: -14.33% | 1M: -15.34%) BELOW TREND.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral tactical stance: trim broad cyclical and bank exposure, add selectively to heavy-industry and high-conviction energy names (PETKM, ASELS) and use TUPRS as a tactical trade on oil-driven catalysts; keep cash/redemption capacity for volatility-triggered opportunities.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
PETKM (1W: +7.51% | 1M: +9.84%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.42% | 1M: +18.70%) CORRECTION, HALKB (1W: -12.23% | 1M: -20.39%) BELOW TREND, TCELL (1W: -4.22% | 1M: -14.45%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: +2.65% | 1M: +9.19%) ABOVE TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Heavy Industry for continued narrow leadership, Banking for spillover risk and idiosyncratic drawdowns, Energy & Chemicals for commodity-linked reversals.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 to hold the short-term consolidation (loss of the weekly range would deepen selling); catalysts: CBRT communication on rates/FX, Q1 company results, global risk sentiment and oil price moves — any clear policy/FX surprise would re-rate banks and exporters.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Neutral market: normal volatility (25.9%) but almost all sectors weak (breadth 1/8) — leadership is narrow and concentrated in heavy industry and select energy names. Tactical approach: avoid broad beta, favor selective longs in PETKM and ASELS while keeping exposure to TUPRS on commodity cues; main risk is continued bank-led weakness and FX/policy shocks.
